CustomMetadata.label: Create 1 approved WorkLog under that vendor

values.value: Create 1 approved WorkLog under that vendor

Log at least one hour against a WorkItem whose vendor is the entity from step 1, then move the WorkLog ApprovedDateTime to a populated value. Without an approved log, the invoice job has nothing to bill.
SELECT COUNT() FROM WorkLog__c WHERE ApprovedDateTime__c != null AND CreatedById = :userId LIMIT 1
